display.purpose: Property identity, room names, completion headings, and final issue titles.

body.purpose: All product controls, help text, and readable body copy.

mono.purpose: Timecodes, evidence IDs, and hashes only.

shadows.name: action-lift
shadows.purpose: Hover or focus on an actionable plate.

motion.name: state
motion.purpose: State feedback and card lift only.

components.name: Evidence Card
components.description: A room or task plate that carries one clear next action.
components.html:
Evidence room

Kitchen

24 items, 3 still need review.
components.css: .ds-card{padding:20px;background:#fffdf8;color:#22262d;border:1px solid #e4dfd3;border-radius:14px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(43,36,20,.05),0 3px 10px -5px rgba(43,36,20,.16);transition:transform 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}.ds-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px -6px rgba(43,36,20,.22),0 12px 30px -18px rgba(43,36,20,.3)}.ds-card h3{margin:8px 0;font:600 22px Georgia,serif}.ds-card p{margin:0;color:#626b76;font:14px system-ui}.ds-kicker{color:#7d5e1b;font:600 11px system-ui;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase}

components.name: Text Field
components.description: A labelled field with an explicit keyboard focus state.
components.css: .ds-field{display:grid;gap:4px;color:#626b76;font:600 12px system-ui}.ds-field input{min-height:44px;padding:8px 10px;background:#f6f3ec;color:#22262d;border:1px solid #c8c1b0;border-radius:7px;font:14px system-ui}.ds-field input:focus{outline:2px solid #9a7729;outline-offset:-1px;border-color:#9a7729}

components.name: Evidence Chip
components.description: A compact status or provenance marker, never a replacement for explanatory text.

components.name: Section Navigation
components.description: Consistent, horizontally scrollable section navigation on a phone.

narrative.overview: Warm paper surfaces carry orientation, progress, reports, comments, and decisions. A dark inspection surface is earned only when a photo or video is being inspected closely. The product should feel like a beautifully prepared property file, not a generic AI tool.

rules.name: Evidence-Only Dark Rule
rules.body: Dark backgrounds are reserved for player and lightbox evidence inspection.

rules.name: Brass Rarity Rule
rules.body: Brass guides action, selection, and provenance, never decoration.

rules.name: Readable Field Rule
rules.body: Active review surfaces do not trade readable text for density.

dos: Do lead each screen with one question and one next action.
Do keep claim, evidence, timestamp, and source video together on mobile.
Do make progress visible in plain language.
donts: Don't use gradients, magic-wand language, or generic AI SaaS dashboards.
Don't use a dark application shell, tiny type, or desktop-only workflow.
Don't treat legal seals, hashes, or timestamps as decoration.
